description: peer-list --include-stale surfaces a sibling session in the same cwd (pair_key NULL fallback). 6-year-old last_seen bins deterministically as 'stale' regardless of wall clock.
pre_sql: INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'alpha', 'claude', 'peer', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z'); INSERT INTO sessions (cwd, label, agent, role, pair_key, started_at, last_seen_at) VALUES ('__CWD__', 'beta', 'codex', 'challenger', NULL, '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z', '2020-01-01T00:00:00Z');
